CVE-2025-23016.title: FastCGI fcgi2 (aka fcgi) 2.x through 2.4.4 has an integer overflo ...
CVE-2025-23016.summary: FastCGI fcgi2 (aka fcgi) 2.x through 2.4.4 has an integer overflow (and resultant heap-based buffer overflow) via crafted nameLen or valueLen values in data to the IPC socket. This occurs in ReadParams in fcgiapp.c.
